Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the Ithaca police department
Summary: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the Ithaca police department.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to allowing Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the Ithaca police department
